content.speakerText: Thanks a million for helping me move this couch!
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你帮我搬沙发了！
content.explanation: 正确答案 'Don't mention it!' 是非正式场合中对感谢的标准回应，表达谦逊和亲切。其他选项语境错误：'I'm sorry to hear that' 用于安慰，'That's not my problem' 显得冷漠，'I'll charge you later' 与朋友间无偿帮忙的语境冲突。

content.speakerText: I'd never have gotten it done without you!
content.speakerTextCn: 没你我真搬不动这沙发！

options.text: Maybe next time you should do it yourself.
I didn't even notice you were struggling.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're a lifesaver!' 精准回应了对方强调自己关键作用的感激，表达高度认可。其他选项要么拒绝帮助（'I'm busy'），要么讽刺（'do it yourself'），或完全无视对方情感（'didn't notice'），均不符合社交礼仪。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me carry all these boxes!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我搬这些箱子！

options.text: No problem! I'm happy to lend a hand.
Why didn't you ask someone else?
It was kind of a hassle.
I'm not strong enough to help next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem! I'm happy to lend a hand.' 自然、积极，符合帮助他人后的回应习惯。'Why didn't you ask someone else?' 显得指责，'It was kind of a hassle' 暗示抱怨，'I'm not strong enough...' 拒绝未来帮助，均破坏友好氛围。

content.template: Thanks a million for helping me move this couch! — ________!
content.hint: 这是对非正式感谢最常用的回应之一，表示‘小事一桩’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Don't mention it（回应感谢）

content.template: I'd never have gotten it done without you! — ________!
content.hint: 用于高度赞扬对方在关键时刻的帮助
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：You're a lifesaver（表达极度感激）

content.template: I really appreciate you helping me carry these heavy boxes. — ________!
content.hint: 这是表达乐意帮忙的简洁口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Happy to help（乐意效劳）

content.speakerText: Thanks a million for helping me move this couch!
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你帮我搬沙发了！
expectedAnswers: No big deal — I love helping you out.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了对方的感谢
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合朋友间非正式对话的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景核心表达如 'don't mention it', 'anytime', 'no big deal'

content.speakerText: I'd never have gotten it done without you!
content.speakerTextCn: 没你我真搬不动这沙发！
expectedAnswers: Happy to help! Seriously, anytime you need me.
It was nothing — I'm just glad I could help.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否认可对方的强调并给予积极回应
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的表达如 'lifesaver', 'anytime'
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、口语化，不生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景核心表达如 'lifesaver', 'anytime', 'glad I could help'

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me carry all these boxes — it was so heavy!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我搬这些箱子，太重了！
expectedAnswers: No problem! I'm happy to lend a hand.
Anytime! I know how tough moving can be.
Don't worry about it — I've been there before!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的感谢和困难描述
语言准确性：语法和词汇是否正确，是否避免负面表达
表达自然度：是否使用自然的口语表达，如 'lend a hand', 'been there'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景相关表达如 'no problem', 'anytime', 'lend a hand'
